nodes.context: Criminal organization based in Veneto, Italy, involved in drug trafficking, money laundering, extortion.
Predecessor criminal organization in Veneto, active in 1970s-1980s, involved in drug trafficking, extortion, money laundering.
Sicilian mafia organization, allied with Nuova Mala del Brenta and supplied cocaine.
Neapolitan mafia organization, allied with Nuova Mala del Brenta.
Calabrian mafia organization, believed to have associates operating in Veneto with Nuova Mala del Brenta.
Apulian mafia organization, mentioned as having mafia-type affiliations within Italy.
Mafia-type organization from Foggia, mentioned as having affiliations within Italy.
Affiliated groups of nomad criminals in Veneto, involved in bank heists, robberies, drug trade, kidnapping.
Powerful group based in Mestre, involved in drug trafficking and other criminal enterprises, strong ties to Mala del Brenta.
Old criminal underworld of Venice, engaged in similar activities as Mestrini, headed by Rizzi brothers and Giancarlo Millo.
Cartel under Silvano Maritan, involved in rivalry with another cartel, later became capo of eastern Venice province.
Sicilian mafia-type organization, colluded with Brenta mafiosi in fraudulent scams at a Maltese casino in 2002.
Defunct Neapolitan mafia organization, listed as ally of Nuova Mala del Brenta.

edges.context: Nuova Mala del Brenta emerged as a successor to the original Mala del Brenta after its dismantlement.
Nuova Mala del Brenta bought cocaine directly from Sicilian Mafia (Cosa Nostra).
Nuova Mala del Brenta has associates from Camorra operating in Veneto.
It is believed that 'Ndrangheta associates operate in Veneto with Nuova Mala del Brenta.
Brenta mafiosi colluded with Stidda members in fraudulent scams at a Maltese casino in 2002.
Nuova Camorra Organizzata is listed as an ally of Nuova Mala del Brenta.
Mestrini had strong ties to the Mala del Brenta.
Silvano Maritan of San Donà di Piave cartel gave a percentage of his assets to Maniero of Mala del Brenta.
Silvano Maritan was a protégé of confined Cosa Nostra boss Salvatore Contorno.
